networkFailure: We couldn't reach your server. Check your connection and try again.
invalidPassword: That password didn't work. Try again.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Log in again.
serverError: Something went wrong on the server. Try again in a moment.
syncFailed: Sync failed. Your data is safe locally — we'll try again soon.
encryptionKeyMissing: This budget is password-protected. Close it and open it again to enter your password.
databaseUnavailable: The app couldn't open your data. Restart the app and try again.
unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Try again, or restart the app if it keeps happening.
saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Try again.
deleteFailed: Couldn't delete this item. Try again.
loadFailed: Couldn't load data. Pull to refresh or try again.
